candidate_summary: 5-component pure-parameter basin-stability: dovetail W_i-W_j corner-alignment + no-normalization pure joinery + Blockbau log-stack row-boundary inter-layer lock + slim clock-tower vertical-spine S_spine anchor (d_spine=d/16) + shingle-roof overlapping head-allocation gradient deflection.
content_words: dovetail interlocking pair-wise weight-direction constraint corner alignment
Blockbau log-stack row-boundary inter-layer lock + vertical clocktower anchor
tall slim clock tower shingle roof

results.name: Transformers Don't Need LayerNorm at Inference
results.rationale: Matches no-normalization component (2) but only at inference; no dovetail/Blockbau/spine/shingle joinery semantics.

results.name: Post-LayerNorm Stable Expressive Deep
results.rationale: Normalization stability but retains LayerNorm; no pair-wise corner alignment or row-boundary lock.

results.name: Normalization-Optimizer Coupling Derf
results.rationale: Normalization-optimizer interaction orthogonal to dovetail joinery.

results.name: LSA Layer-Wise Sparsity ICLR 2026
results.rationale: Layer-wise sparsity unrelated to corner alignment + no-metal joinery.

results.name: CLoRA Controlled Subspace
results.rationale: Subspace control tangentially echoes spine anchor; lacks pair-wise weight-direction constraint.

results.name: Basin-Like Loss Landscape GO
results.rationale: Direct basin-stability framing match; missing dovetail corner-align + spine d/16 + shingle deflection.

results.name: Attention Horizontal-Vertical Graph Spine
results.rationale: Vertical spine motif aligns with slim clock-tower S_spine anchor; no dovetail + no-norm + row-boundary lock.

results.name: Cross-Attention Head Position Patterns
results.rationale: Head position overlap weakly mirrors shingle-roof allocation; no Blockbau lock + dovetail corner.

decision_rationale: No prior art reaches kw>=2 / sem>=0.7 / func>=0.7; max hit score 0.57 (Transformers LayerNorm Removal). 5-component dovetail + no-norm + Blockbau row-lock + slim spine + shingle deflection appears novel combination. NOTE: primary scored 8 hits at sem 0.72-0.84 / func 0.72-0.86 on no-norm + basin + subspace adjacencies; verdict-level disagreement flagged.
